client_id.description: The client ID of the application for which to create a service principal

account_enabled.description: Whether or not the service principal account is enabled

alternative_names.description: A list of alternative names for the service principal

description.description: Description of the service principal provided for internal end-users

login_url.description: The URL where the service provider redirects the user to Azure AD to authenticate

notification_email_addresses.description: List of email addresses where Azure AD sends a notification when the active certificate is near the expiration date

preferred_single_sign_on_mode.description: The single sign-on mode configured for this application

use_existing.description: When true, any existing service principal linked to the same application will be automatically imported

tags.description: A list of tags to apply to the service principal

feature_tags.description: Feature tags configuration for the service principal

saml_single_sign_on.description: SAML single sign-on configuration for the service principal

app_role_assignment_required.description: Whether the service principal has app role assignment enabled
